'''''Red Wind''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in service with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]].

The starship first arrived to save a TIE Prototype Facility that was being destroyed by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] in a lone [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-Wing]].

She attempted to destroy the [[Crescent (corvette group)|''Crescent'']] group of [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian Corvettes]] and stop the [[Evacuation of Yavin|evacuation]] of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] repelled the marauding squadrons of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] until ''Crescent'' made their way to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. ''Red Wind'' reappeared after [[Operation Grain Snatch]] to stop three [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] convoys while they were looking for a place to set up a new base of operations. However, [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] was once again able to repel its squadrons and the convoys were able to make their escape.

Finally, ''Red Wind'' was reported to be experiencing a malfunction in its engines above [[Plooriod IV]]. Stranded there, she was covered by an array of mines while being repaired by the crew of the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Ramit]]''. The corvette crews of the Alliance decided to launch a retaliatory assault for the atrocities committed by the frigate and her notorious [[Red Wind commander|commander]]. During the [[Attack on the Red Wind|attack]], Farlander cleared her defenses while three groups of corvettes, [[Striker (corvette group)|''Striker'']], [[Hammer (corvette group)|''Hammer'']], and [[Arrow (corvette group)|''Arrow'']], assaulted the frigate until it was destroyed.
